Aranya Capital Public Company Limited — Legal & Compliance Note (Confidential; PDPA/SEA handling required)
Subject: Pre-announcement controls for cross-border sustainability-linked loan and tokenized carbon credit pilot; SET/SEC Thailand considerations
The Company is negotiating a THB 1.8bn sustainability-linked loan with a 3M THOR+140–200 bps margin ratchet tied to Scope 1–2 intensity reductions; terms are non-public and remain subject to Credit Committee on 3 June and Board approval on 6 June.
In parallel, we are drafting a pilot to tokenize verified carbon credits for internal settlement on a licensed digital asset exchange; application to the SEC Thailand’s digital asset sandbox is in progress and has not been disclosed to the market.
A cyber incident was reported by vendor SkyLotus Cloud Co., Ltd. affecting their secure file transfer nodes used for our diligence dataroom; no exfiltration of PDPA personal data is confirmed, but encryption keys for a non-public folder were exposed, which may be material depending on forensics.
Insider list must be updated immediately to include Mr. Prasert Inthanon (CFO, employee code AC-1128), Ms. Lalita Boonchai (Head, Digital Assets), and Khun Thirada Wong (Sustainability), each to sign acknowledgment; a blackout window for directors and list members is effective from today until SET disclosure.
Information barriers: restrict access to “Project Banyan” rooms; no forwarding to the Trading or Digital Assets Desk; do not discuss terms with research or sales; any breach may constitute tipping under the Securities and Exchange Act.
Engagement with GreenTrace Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) for MRV data and Qilin Ventures SPC (Cayman) for a minority structured note is subject to NDAs; use only codenames and do not selectively disclose commercial pricing outside the dataroom.
ESG covenant calibration uses a 2023 baseline that is pending limited assurance by Thamma Assurance Co.; do not publish intensity targets or climate-aligned capex figures externally until assurance is complete and an SET submission is cleared.
If the Board approves, Legal will pre-clear the immediate disclosure with the SET and coordinate with SEC Thailand Corporate Finance; if tokenization proceeds, assess whether a Form 69/DA filing or other digital-asset notification is triggered.
For the cyber incident, if materiality thresholds are met, we will submit a clarification via SET’s system within 24 hours and notify the SEC Thailand as required; PDPA breach notification will be evaluated with the DPO in case of any identified data subject impact.
Training note: HR will host a staff webinar on “insider lists, blackout windows, and crypto risk controls” next week; this is educational content only and contains no deal specifics or market-sensitive information.
Marketing note: the Sustainability team may update the website to describe our general ESG framework and crypto custody principles as an operations overview, without any issuer-specific numbers, pricing, or counterparties.
Please channel all queries through Ms. Nicha Anuwat, Compliance Officer (nicha.anuwat@aranyacapital.co.th; +66-2-555-0199 ext. 314) and refrain from using external messengers for project communications.
PDPA reminder: this memo includes personal data of employees; handle on a need-to-know basis, do not forward outside Aranya Capital PCL, and return signed insider acknowledgments by 17:00 tomorrow.
